title: Slip and fall - property inspection
description: Property Manager Kristen Ybarra slipped on wet tile at entry of a vacant property during inspection after irrigation system left running by landscaper. Right ankle sprain. Urgent care visit - minor sprain no fracture. Returned to desk duty next day full field duty 5 days post-injury. OSHA recordable. Added wet floor awareness and inspection protocol. Landscapers now notified not to irrigate within 4 hours of scheduled inspection.
project_name: 2025 Annual HVAC Tune-Up Program - All Properties

title: Dog bite near-miss - tenant property
description: Maintenance Coordinator Tom Whitaker arrived for scheduled repair at 3890 Warner Rd Gilbert. Tenant failed to notify of dog. Unlocked gate per access protocol - large dog approached aggressively before Tom retreated and re-latched gate. No injury. Full incident review conducted. New policy: all work order confirmations include Pet on Premises question. All team members carrying dog deterrent spray. Tenant formally notified of responsibility to secure pets for maintenance visits.
project_name: Pest Control Annual Program - All 127 Units

title: Heat illness - field inspection during extreme heat
description: Leasing Specialist Kevin (typo - Javier) Reyes completed 6 consecutive property showings in 114F heat on July 28 2025 without adequate hydration. Experienced dizziness and nausea during 6th showing. Immediately returned to office A/C and recovered. No medical treatment required. Revised summer showing protocol: maximum 3 consecutive outdoor showings with mandatory 20-minute cool-down inside. Water required in vehicle at all times June-September.
project_name: 2025 Annual HVAC Tune-Up Program - All Properties
